checks.description: v2 post-PR #162 adversarial-review fix: the v1 Check 1a/1b had a mutually-exclusive WHERE clause (A ∧ B) ∧ (¬A ∨ ¬B) that returned 0 regardless of data. v2 replaces with three substantive checks: (1a) ref-cohort MIN/MAX in bounds; (1b) quarter-label consistency; (1c) PSI reference SQL cites spec §7 timestamp bounds verbatim.
checks.sql_check_1a:
SELECT
    MIN(started_at) AS ref_min,
    MAX(started_at) AS ref_max,
    COUNT(*) AS ref_count
FROM matches_history_minimal
WHERE started_at >= TIMESTAMP '2022-08-29'
  AND started_at <  TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01'
checks.sql_check_1b:
SELECT
    derived_quarter,
    MIN(started_at) AS qmin,
    MAX(started_at) AS qmax,
    COUNT(*) AS n
FROM (
    SELECT
        started_at,
        CONCAT(
            CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM started_at) AS VARCHAR),
            '-Q',
            CAST(CEIL(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM started_at) / 3.0) AS INTEGER)::VARCHAR
        ) AS derived_quarter
    FROM matches_history_minimal
    WHERE started_at >= TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01'
      AND started_at <  TIMESTAMP '2025-01-01'
)
GROUP BY derived_quarter
ORDER BY derived_quarter

checks.description: AST/regex scan of T03/T04 notebooks for POST_GAME tokens in pre-game feature selection contexts.
Assert T03 JSON frozen_reference_edges.ref_start == '2022-08-29' and ref_end == '2022-12-31' (spec §7).
